metadata.title: ERP Academie — Decision Support System (DSS)
metadata.architecture: Offline-First, Pure VBA, Zero External Dependencies
metadata.warnings-status: ALL RESOLVED (W001-W010). Dead code removed: Module1, Module2, mod_Config_Test, mod_StockEntry_Logic_Enhanced, mod_TestHarness, frmSystemLog, frmStockEntry_Enhanced

known-issues.issue: UTF-8 em dashes in .bas cause syntax errors on import (replace with -)
Public Const after procedures causes syntax error (move before)
MASTER_PWD Public Const not resolved cross-module (use Property Get)
Comments between _ continuations break parser (remove from continuation blocks)
Stale p-code cache causes false compile errors (always rebuild from scratch)
VBA-specific skills (vba-build, vba-debug) exist on disk but not in OpenCode global skill catalog — load via instructions.md + XML context

module.name: mod_Config
module.purpose: Central config — sheet names, doc types, passwords, thesis parameters
module.api: Property Get SYS_TITLE, DOC_TYPE_BR, MASTER_PWD — Public Const for all others

module.name: mod_StockEngine
module.purpose: Core stock calculations — ROP, EOQ, CMUP, safety stock, ABC classification
module.api: GetSafetyStock, ComputeEOQ, ComputeROP, ValidateStockLevel, UpdateArticleStockBalance, GetAnnualDemandFromHistory, CalculateCMUP, RefreshAllCMUP, UpdateAllABCClassifications

module.name: mod_StockEntry_Logic
module.deps: mod_Config, mod_Utilities, mod_Localization, mod_Database, mod_SyncBridge, mod_AuditTrail, mod_ExportEngine, mod_TransactionSafety
module.purpose: Stock entry form logic — user input, validation, multi-line docs, transaction posting
module.api: InitializeForm, cmbTypeDoc_Change, cmbArticle_Change, cmbCategorie_Change, txtQuantite_Change, GenerateAutoRef, btnAjouterLigne_Click, btnSupprimerLigne_Click, btnEnregistrer_Click, btnAnnuler_Click

module.name: mod_SyncBridge
module.purpose: Transaction-to-metrics bridge — syncs stock balances, CMUP, ABC classifications

module.name: mod_Dashboard
module.purpose: Dashboard refresh — KPIs, critical stock table, ABC/XYZ summary

module.name: mod_QRCode
module.purpose: QR code generation — 3-tier fallback (Google Charts -> QRServer API -> offline verification block)

module.name: mod_ExportEngine
module.purpose: PDF export — Algerian public sector compliance (TVA exemption, 4 signatures, NIF/NIS/RC/Art tax IDs, QR code)

module.name: mod_Utilities
module.purpose: Shared utilities — safe value parsing, article lookup, date validation, dropdown setup, heatmap
module.api: RestoreMouvementsHeaders, SafeVal, GetArticleField, IsValidDate, SetupLocationDropdown, ApplyInventoryHeatmap, ExportLowStockPDF

module.name: mod_Reports
module.purpose: Report generation — monthly reports and stock cards (Fiche de Stock)

module.name: mod_Database
module.purpose: Low-level sheet read/write with protection, type safety, staging support

module.name: mod_AuditTrail
module.purpose: Audit logging — write, query, clear (protected operations)

module.name: mod_ReceiptTag
module.purpose: Receipt tag generation — PDF with item details

module.name: mod_TransactionSafety
module.purpose: Atomic transactions — pre/post snapshots, auto-rollback, crash recovery

module.name: mod_SharedEnvironment
module.purpose: Shared paths, user session, file locking, batch export, auto-backup
module.api: GetSharedExportPath, GetCurrentUser, AcquireFileLock, ReleaseFileLock, BulkImportMouvements, ScheduleAutoBackup

module.name: mod_SheetSetup
module.purpose: Sheet initialization and protection

module.name: mod_Procurement
module.purpose: Procurement planning — order suggestions based on ROP/EOQ

module.name: mod_Restore
module.purpose: Data restore from backups

module.name: mod_Backup
module.purpose: Workbook backup with timestamped copies

module.name: mod_Analysis
module.purpose: Data analysis helpers

module.name: mod_Localization
module.purpose: String localization — French UI labels from SYS_STRINGS sheet

module.name: mod_ApprovalWorkflow
module.purpose: Purchase request approval workflow

module.name: mod_StockCalculations
module.purpose: Standalone EOQ/ROP calculations on CALCULS_EOQ sheet

module.name: mod_Navigation
module.purpose: Sheet navigation and button click handlers

module.name: mod_Forecasting
module.purpose: Demand forecasting — 3/7/14-day moving averages, 30-day projection, MAD accuracy

module.name: mod_SupplierRegistry
module.purpose: Supplier catalog with Algerian DGI tax IDs (NIF/NIS/RC/Art)

module.name: mod_ThemingEngine
module.purpose: Enterprise UI theme — color palette, flat design, Calibri typography

module.name: mod_UIEnhancements
module.purpose: Additional UI polish — status bar, form layout

module.name: mod_BonLivraison
module.purpose: Delivery note (Bon de Livraison) operations

module.name: mod_Budget
module.purpose: Budget tracking — guarded by IsBudgetSheetAvailable()

module.name: mod_BudgetSetup
module.purpose: Budget sheet initialization

module.name: mod_Facture
module.purpose: Invoice (Facture) operations

module.name: mod_UI_Setup
module.purpose: UI ribbon/button setup

module.name: mod_LogViewer
module.purpose: Audit log viewer UI

module.name: mod_CSVImportExport
module.purpose: CSV bulk import/export for MOUVEMENTS, ARTICLES, FOURNISSEURS

module.name: mod_Barcode
module.purpose: Keyboard-wedge barcode scanner input

module.name: mod_DemoData
module.purpose: 38-day thesis demo data generation

module.name: mod_AutoBackup
module.purpose: Automatic scheduled backups

module.name: MAIN_MACROS
module.purpose: Entry-point macro sheet — button targets and workbook open sequence

sheets.sheet: Article catalog — stock, CMUP, ABC classification, ROP, EOQ
Document template (base layout for PDF export)

call-graph.node: depends on 8 modules: Config, Utilities, Localization, Database, SyncBridge, AuditTrail, ExportEngine, TransactionSafety
leaf — no dependencies (env vars, file API)
